Created attachment 216881
Postfix Build Log

FreeBSD 11.4-RELEASE-p1 amd64

I am unable to build 'postfix-current-sasl'. It has always built successfully prior to the latest update. The poudriere log file for the build is attached.

The build ends with this error:

=======================<phase: check-sanity   >============================
Ignoring: is marked as broken: does not build with DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl
===========================================================================
build of mail/postfix-current-sasl | postfix-current-sasl-3.6.20200725,6 ended at Thu Jul 30 05:56:34 EDT 2020
